name: Universal OS surprise modal repair
objective: Continue the parent task when an unrelated modal appears unexpectedly.

steps.expect: Temporal state records the modal and computes a UI diff.
A modal blocker is pushed with evidence and a repair hint.
The repair planner proposes a bounded Escape hotkey for unrelated modals.
Successful repair retires the active modal blocker.

expectations: The frontier model is not allowed to dismiss modal evidence without local verification.
The repair action is non-destructive and policy-checkable.
The parent goal remains resumable after the modal closes.
